title: nodejs22 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:22.19.0-2]
- Fix nodejs_abi generator in template

[1:22.19.0-1]
- Update to version 22.19.0 (rhbz#2391591)

[1:22.18.0-3]
- spec: fix node binary calls to use versioned binary
full_text:

[1:22.19.0-1]

[1:22.18.0-3]
- spec: fix node binary calls to use versioned binary
